description: Configuration drift detection allowlist - defines which workspace configs can extend base configs

apps/*/biome.json.reason: Apps can extend root biome.json with app-specific rules

apps/*/tsconfig.json.reason: Apps extend tsconfig.base.json with app-specific compiler options

packages/*/biome.json.reason: Packages can extend root biome.json with package-specific rules

apps/*/.snapbackrc.reason: Apps can have app-specific SnapBack protection policies

comments.workspaceConfigs: Glob patterns matching workspace configs that are allowed to differ from base configs
comments.requiresExtends: If specified, workspace config must extend this base config (string or array of strings)
comments.ignoredPaths: Paths to completely ignore during drift detection
